title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED

chunks.text:
H. No. 1939 / 57 OG No. 4, 628 (January 23, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2751, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

ac

), page 313, Group III, subparagraph (28), for the Province of Leyte, paragraph

f

, Section two of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred is amended to read as follows:

"(ac) San Isidro Social Hall, Malitbogâ

Construction P3,000.00."

SEC. 2. Item (140), page 709, subparagraph (

ab

), for the Province of Leyte, paragraph

b

, Title A, Section three of the same Act is amended to read as follows:

"(140) Construction, Hogpa Barrio School, Malitbog P4,000.00."

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
